hooks.command: echo '{"additionalContext": "[HOOK REMINDER] You edited a file. Remember: (1) Update CODEBASE_MAP.md if you changed backend files (2) Run npm test before commit (3) Backend files = commit only, no deploy"}'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(backend|Backend|SaleTab|CloneTab|CustomerListTab|CustomerCard|CustomerDetailView|MasterDataTab|AppointmentTab|FinanceTab|DepositPanel|WalletPanel|MembershipPanel|PointsPanel|TreatmentFormPage|BackendDashboard)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Backend files should NOT be deployed via vercel --prod. Commit only." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

echo '{"additionalContext": "[SESSION CONTEXT] LoverClinic Backend OPD Phase 6/12 DONE. Key rules: (1) Backend = commit only, NO deploy (2) npm test ALL PASS before commit (3) Update CODEBASE_MAP.md after code changes (4) Thai culture: red color NOT on patient names (5) No IIFE in JSX (Vite OXC crash) (6) Firestore REST PATCH needs updateMask always"}'
